chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3870 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 04.09.2025 Mr. Nabi Bux advocate for the petitioners Mr. Muhammad Noonari DPG Mr. Sandeep Malani AAG I.O/ASI Ghulam Nabi PS Rehmatpur District Larkana and SIP Naseem Khan PS Shah Latif Town, Karachi -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. I.O ASI Ghulam Nabi of PS Rehmatpur Larkana is present in Court and states that he has recorded the 161 Cr.P.C statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Bisma and on the basis of that statement, he undertakes to file his report under ‘C’ class before the concerned Judicial Magistrate within 03 days of the date of this order. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
